description: Beautifully RENOVATED SOUTH facing townhouse with 3 bedrooms plus DEN (office), 3 bathrooms, & a bright open concept layout. Spacious rooms & excellent flow create an airy, comfortable living space. Enjoy a south-facing deck with a beautiful treed outlook, providing privacy & a peaceful setting. Fully renovated in 2022 with close to $200K in upgrades, all completed with City & Strata permits; including removal of interior walls on the main floor to create the open concept layout, new kitchen with quality cabinets, quartz countertops & top appliances, updated bathrooms, new flooring & tile, new plumbing, new hot water tank & new blinds (some motorized). Inc 2 parkings & 2 storages. Exceptionally maintained & move-in ready. A rare fully renovated townhouse opportunity in North Vancouver.
